summary: Plan-only live PR inventory classification. No GitHub mutations are planned because the shard is not a dedupe cluster, merge/fix/raise_pr are blocked, low-signal closeout is disabled, and the hydrated PRs each retain independent review or proof/maintainer decision paths.

actions.reason: Keep as an independent open PR needing proof/CI resolution outside this inventory shard.
Keep as an independent maintainer-owned PR; any technical correctness or merge decision belongs to maintainer review, not inventory closeout.
Keep as an independent feature PR awaiting maintainer review and possible sequencing; not duplicate or closable in this shard.
Keep related to its hydrated issue/candidate fix path; it is not safe to close or mark fixed-by-candidate while review still says needs changes and author follow-up is active.
